# Arclion Marketing | AI-Powered SME Marketing Platform

## Overview
Arclion Marketing is an AI-powered marketing SaaS platform designed for small and medium enterprises (SMEs). It provides 36 AI marketing skills to help businesses create content, optimize SEO, and track analytics — without requiring a dedicated marketing team.

## Features

### Core Marketing Skills
- **Copywriting**: Generate ads, emails, social posts, and landing page copy
- **AI SEO**: Content optimization for AI search engines
- **Analytics**: Track performance and user behavior
- **Social Content**: Platform-specific social media copy
- **Email Sequences**: Drip campaigns and newsletters
- **A/B Testing**: Test and optimize marketing campaigns

### Available Tools
- Product Marketing Analyzer
- Ad Direction Generator
- Creative Content Creator
- AI SEO Optimizer
- Copywriting Assistant
- Campaign Performance Tracker

## Pricing Plans

### Starter (Free)
- 100 credits
- Perfect for trying out the platform
- Access to basic marketing skills

### Pro ($9/month)
- 1,000 credits per month
- For regular marketers
- Full access to all 36 AI marketing skills
- Priority processing

### Unlimited ($29/month)
- Unlimited credits
- Power users and agencies
- Full access to all features
- API access
- Dedicated support

## Getting Started
1. Sign up at https://sme-marketing-saas.vercel.app/sign-up
2. Get 100 free credits on signup
3. Choose a marketing skill and start creating

## Technical Stack
- Next.js 16
- React 19
- Clerk Authentication
- Prisma Database
- MiniMax AI / OpenAI

## Contact
- Website: https://sme-marketing-saas.vercel.app
